channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Kt-Typealias-Ts - Tue Jun 09 12:40:49 UTC 2026
item.description:
Enhances Kotlin's typealias by enforcing strict compile-time type safety. This plugin prevents accidental mixing of distinct typealiases that share the same underlying...
vendor: Codirex downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: org.codirex.kt-typealias-ts

item.title: BookmarkAI - Tue Jun 09 09:42:25 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: Kshana - PNT simulator - Mon Jun 08 20:15:15 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Ashforde OÜ downloads: 3 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.kshana.ide

item.title: STM32 for CLion - Fri Jun 05 11:49:24 UTC 2026

item.title: SpiceDB Toolkit - Sun May 17 10:13:07 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.description:
